title: MikroTik K-65 - Rackmount ears for RB4011 series
description: MikroTik K-65 is a set of rack-mount ears used to mount your RB4011 into a 19" rack. Due to the very low clearance height of the RouterBOARD, it only takes 1U GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
